title: Exclusivo Mezcla Fleece Throw Blanket for Sofa Couch, Soft Lightweight and Fluffy Bed Blankets, Suitable for All Seasons, 127x152 CM, White
features: High Quality: Crafted from premium microfiber polyester and delicately brushed for supreme softness, this flannel blanket offers the perfect balance of warmth and lightness, ensuring comfort without causing overheating. An enhanced antistatic treatment significantly reduces static cling, enhancing your relaxation experience.

Versatility: Suitable for any season, this luxurious throw flannel fleece blanket serves multiple purposes. It can effortlessly transition from a cozy bedspread to a stylish coverlet or a functional bed cover/bed Sheet, making it an indispensable accessory in your home.

Durability: Constructed with sturdy microfiber fabric and reinforced with solid stitches, this plush blanket surpasses most others in longevity. Easy to maintain, it promises enduring quality and comfort without special care.

Elegant Design: Elevate your decor with this blanket’s velvet and soft feel and sophisticated jacquard pattern. The double-faced plush fabric not only offers a luxurious texture but also adds a glossy sheen that complements and enhances your living space with its modern aesthetic.

Easy Care: This blanket is machine washable and dryer safe. It maintains its cozy texture and vibrant color without shrinking, fading, or unraveling, ensuring it remains a favorite in your linen collection.
